title: OpenBindings Conformance Fixture
description: JSON Schema describing the format of a conformance fixture file (one OBI-D-## or OBI-T-## rule per file).

rule.description: The OBI-D-## or OBI-T-## identifier this fixture covers, as defined in §10 of the OpenBindings spec.

section.description: The spec section the rule is defined in (e.g., '10.2' for document rules, '10.3' for tool rules).

description.description: Human-readable description of the rule, ideally byte-faithful to the spec text.

notes.description: Optional file-level rationale text about the rule's coverage in this corpus, e.g. why some test cases are intentionally out of format. Informational; not consumed by harnesses.

coverage.description: If present, marks this fixture as providing partial coverage of its rule. 'positive-only' means the fixture has no discriminating negative cases (typically because negative cases cannot be expressed in the document-level fixture format without per-format harness logic, cf. OBI-T-06). A fixture marked this way is counted separately in the manifest and does not contribute to a 'complete coverage' claim. Absence means complete coverage.

tests.description: Test cases for this rule. Each case bundles an OBI document with the expected validity verdict.

description.description: Description of what this specific case tests.

document.description: An OBI document, embedded inline. Any JSON value (typically an object).

valid.description: true if the document satisfies the rule (a conformant tool should accept it); false if the document violates the rule (a conformant tool should reject it).

violates.description: When valid is false, the set of OBI-D-## or OBI-T-## rules the document is intended to test as violated. Lists semantic rules only; OBI-D-02 is omitted when a more specific rule names the violation. Minimum-set semantics: a conformant validator MUST report at least these rules.

requiresMaxTested.description: When set, the test only applies to SDKs whose MaxTestedVersion is at least this SemVer 2.0.0 version. Used for forward-compatible OBI-T-04 scenarios (e.g., a post-1.0 SDK MUST accept same-major-higher-minor documents) that cannot be evaluated against a pre-1.0 SDK without contradicting OBI-T-04. Runners SHOULD skip tests whose requiresMaxTested exceeds the SDK's MaxTestedVersion.

requiresMinSupported.description: When set, the test only applies to SDKs whose MinSupportedVersion is at least this SemVer 2.0.0 version. Used for downward OBI-T-04 refusal scenarios (a document declaring a version below the SDK's minimum MUST be refused), which are meaningless for an SDK whose supported range extends down to the fixture's document version. Runners SHOULD skip tests whose requiresMinSupported exceeds the SDK's MinSupportedVersion, reporting skips separately.
